rows.description: 1748 Soluta Varia.
rows.notes: Used gemini-flash. It correctly combines '1748' and 'Soluta Varia' as a single header for the page, which gpt-5-mini split into two rows. Visual confirmation of combined header and gemini-flash's note as a better structural interpretation.

rows.description: Ap. 19. to ye Bursar for Cash out of ye Thes. Augm.
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Description 'Thes. Augm.' confirmed by visual inspection, preferring gemini-flash's reading over gpt-5-mini's 'Wothers Augm.'.
rows.english_description: Cash paid to the Bursar drawn from the Thesaurus Augmentation fund.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Cash paid to the Bursar drawn from the Thesaurus Augmentation fund, amounting to £50 0s 0d.

rows.description: 29 to Landtax for ye 2 Houses at BachGate
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Description 'BachGate' confirmed by visual inspection, preferring gemini-flash's reading over gpt-5-mini's 'Back Gate'.
rows.english_description: Payment of the land tax for two houses at Bachgate.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of the land tax for two houses at Bachgate, amounting to £1 17s 4d.

rows.description: May 9 to Mr Correns for Candles Hall & Chapple
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's amounts (£30 5s 6d) and description ('Correns', 'Candles'). Gpt-5-mini had incorrect amounts (£30 6s 8d) and slightly misread the description.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Correns for candles supplied to the Hall and Chapel.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Correns for candles supplied to the Hall and Chapel, amounting to £30 5s 6d.

rows.description: to Mr Correns 1½ for Candles Omitted
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description, including 'Correns' and '1½ for Candles'. gemini-flash's note correctly interprets '1½' as a quantity, adding to its trustworthiness for this line.
rows.english_description: Additional payment to Mr Correns for candles omitted previously.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Additional payment to Mr Correns for candles omitted previously, amounting to £0 9s 0d.

rows.description: 10 to Mr. Horner for Cash pd Mr. Soc for bind. B. Books
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description 'Mr. Soc' and 'bind. B. Books' over gpt-5-mini's 'Doe' and 'bindg.'.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Horner for cash paid to Mr Soc for binding the college books.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Horner for cash paid to Mr Soc for binding the books, amounting to £0 12s 0d.

rows.description: Sept. 28 to Corn price at Mic.
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description 'Mic.', likely an abbreviation for Michaelmas, over gpt-5-mini's 'Mice'. Gpt-5-mini's note expressed uncertainty, which lowered trust.
rows.english_description: Payment for the price of corn at Michaelmas.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for the price of corn at Michaelmas, amounting to £0 1s 0d.

rows.description: Oct. 5 to Riding Bursar
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's amounts (£1 7s 5d) over gpt-5-mini's (£1 1s 0d). Gpt-5-mini's note stated '01 01 00' but the image clearly shows '7' for shillings and '5' for pence.
rows.english_description: Payment to the Riding Bursar (allowance or stipend).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the Riding Bursar, amounting to £1 7s 5d.

rows.description: 10 to ye Steward for keeping Court at Little Feve
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's amounts (£1 0s 0d) and description ('Little Feve'). Gpt-5-mini misread shillings as '1' and 'Feve' as 'Tew'.
rows.english_description: Payment to the Steward for holding the court at Little Feve.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the Steward for holding the court at Little Feve, amounting to £1 0s 0d.

rows.description: to Servants Turnpikes & Expenses on ye Progrees
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description, specifically 'Turnpikes', 'Expenses', and 'Progrees'.
rows.english_description: Expenses for servants' turnpike tolls and other costs on the college Progress (inspection tour).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Expenses for servants' turnpike tolls and other costs on the Progress, amounting to £3 10s 0d.

rows.description: brought to Acct cash pd Mr. Prince on ye Delivery
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's amounts (£0 0s 6d) and that its description correctly corresponds to a single ledger entry. Gpt-5-mini incorrectly read pence as '5' and merged this row's description with the subsequent row's description.
rows.english_description: Cash paid to Mr Prince on delivery, carried to the account.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Cash paid to Mr Prince on delivery and carried to the account, amounting to £0 0s 6d.

rows.description: ye 1st Vol. of Mr. Bowers Hist. of Popes
rows.notes: Used gemini-flash. This is a distinct ledger entry with amounts (£0 0s 6d) clearly visible on the page, which gpt-5-mini incorrectly merged into the previous row's description.
rows.english_description: Purchase of the first volume of Bower's History of the Popes.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Purchase of the first volume of Bower's History of the Popes, amounting to £0 0s 6d.

rows.description: 22 pd ye Cook his Bill for Mops, Brooms &c.
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description 'pd ye Cook' over gpt-5-mini's 'pd of Cook'.
rows.english_description: Payment to the Cook for mops, brooms and other household items.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the Cook for mops, brooms and other household items, amounting to £3 10s 10d.

rows.description: 25 pd Bayliff for Carrying away Rubbish
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description 'Bayliff' over gpt-5-mini's 'Baylis'.
rows.english_description: Payment to the bailiff for removing rubbish.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the bailiff for removing rubbish, amounting to £2 0s 0d.

rows.description: 25 to Mr. Horner for Battel Books, paper Ink &c
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description, specifically the date '25' and 'Battel Books'. gemini-flash's note indicates a careful transcription of 'Battel' (corrected from 'Battie'), which adds to its trustworthiness.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Horner for battel books, paper, ink and stationery.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Horner for battel books, paper, ink and stationery, amounting to £0 17s 4d.

rows.description: to Mr. Horner for binding 2 Butter Books
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description '2 Butter Books' over gpt-5-mini's '2 Buttery Books'.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Horner for binding two butter books (account books).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Horner for binding two butter books, amounting to £1 4s 0d.

rows.description: 27 to Mr. Teasler his Bill
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's amounts (£13 4s 1d) and description ('Teasler'). Gpt-5-mini significantly misread the amounts as (£0 13s 4d) and misread the name as 'Easler'.
rows.english_description: Payment of Mr Teasler's bill (unspecified goods or services).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of Mr Teasler's bill, amounting to £13 4s 1d.

rows.description: to Mr. Thomson his Bill
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's amounts (£4 8s 10½d), including the 0.5 pence fraction clearly marked. Gemini-flash's specific note about detecting the fraction is superior. Gpt-5-mini misread pence as '6' and missed the fraction.
rows.english_description: Payment of Mr Thomson's bill (unspecified goods or services).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of Mr Thomson's bill, amounting to £4 8s 10½d.

rows.description: 31 to Mr. Hachworth his Bill
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's amounts (£3 2s 7¾d), including the 0.75 pence fraction clearly marked. Gemini-flash's specific note about detecting the fraction is superior. Gpt-5-mini missed the fraction and had a slightly different spelling of the surname.
rows.english_description: Payment of Mr Hachworth's bill (unspecified goods or services).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of Mr Hachworth's bill, amounting to £3 2s 7¾d.

rows.description: to Mr. Jaquest her Bill
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's amounts (£7 7s 3d) and description ('Mr. Jaquest'). Gpt-5-mini significantly misread the amounts and incorrectly detected a pence fraction; its note indicated low confidence due to faintness, reinforcing the choice of gemini-flash's clear reading.
rows.english_description: Payment of Mr Jaquest's bill (unspecified goods or services).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of Mr Jaquest's bill, amounting to £7 7s 3d.

rows.description: Nov. 1 to Lumbard for Wine Oct. 5. &c
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description 'Lumbard' over gpt-5-mini's 'Lumbart'.
rows.english_description: Payment to Lumbard for wine supplied (noting October 5 reference).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Lumbard for wine supplied, amounting to £1 5s 10d.

rows.description: to Mullinex his Bill for Old Pewter &c.
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's amounts (£11 18s 0d) over gpt-5-mini's (5d pence). Also confirmed 'Mullinex' and 'Old Pewter' in description.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mullinex for a bill relating to old pewter and related items.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mullinex for a bill relating to old pewter and related items, amounting to £11 18s 0d.

rows.description: to Ballance of ye Last years Acct
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's amounts (£190 15s 0d) over gpt-5-mini's (3d pence). Also confirmed 'of ye' in description.
rows.english_description: Payment of the balance due on last year's account.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of the balance due on last year's account, amounting to £190 15s 0d.

rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description ('£') and amounts (£423 13s 10½d), including the 0.5 pence fraction. Gpt-5-mini incorrectly identified the fraction as 0.75 and included amounts in the description; its note expressed uncertainty, reinforcing gemini-flash's superior reading.

rows.description: All
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description ('All') and amounts (0 pounds, 9s 10½d). The pounds column is clearly blank. Gpt-5-mini completely missed the 'All' description and incorrectly associated the floating '411' with this row, demonstrating a significant structural and reading error.

rows.description: Summa omn. Solutorum
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's amounts (£835 3s 0½d) and correctly identifies this as a 'total' row. Gpt-5-mini incorrectly classified it as a 'header' with no amounts and its note stated 'no amount printed on the same line', directly contradicting the visual evidence. Gpt-5-mini then created an extra row with a misread amount (gpt-5-mini R28) that does not exist for this line.

rows.description: unde Deduct. Recept. quae erant
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's amounts (£694 12s 0½d) and correctly identifies this as a 'total' row, including its corrected Latin spelling in the description. Gpt-5-mini incorrectly classified it as a 'header' with no amounts and its note stated 'no monetary figures on this exact line', contradicting visual evidence. Gpt-5-mini then created an extra row (gpt-5-mini R29) with a misread amount (9d pence instead of 0½d) that belongs to this line.

rows.description: rest Debit pro Computante & petenda e Thes.
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's amounts (£140 11s 0½d) and correctly identifies this as a 'total' row, including its corrected Latin spelling in the description. Gpt-5-mini did not extract this row's description and then created an extra row (gpt-5-mini R30) with a misread amount (149 pounds and 4d pence instead of 140 pounds and 0½d).

rows.description: approbat. per praesentes
rows.notes: Both models correctly identified this as a header without amounts. Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description 'praesentes' as a more accurate Latin transcription compared to gpt-5-mini's 'presenty'.

rows.description: Jacobum Documbe Rectorem.
rows.notes: Both models correctly identified this as a header. Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's transcription 'Jacobum Documbe' is visually more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'Jacobus Bagcumbe'.

rows.description: Jacobum Corporat Sub-Rectorem.
rows.notes: Both models correctly identified this as a header. Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's transcription 'Jacobum Corporat' is visually more accurate and supported by its note about common Latin usage and penmanship, compared to gpt-5-mini's 'Jacobus Copsonal'.

rows.description: Thoman Bray S J Tral
rows.notes: Used gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's transcription 'Thoman Bray S J Tral'. Gpt-5-mini misread some initials and incorrectly combined this signature line with subsequent ones into a single row, demonstrating a structural error.

rows.description: Jacobum Stetson Bursarium Jun
rows.notes: Used gemini-flash. This is a distinct signature line clearly visible, which gpt-5-mini incorrectly merged into a broader 'signatures' row.

rows.notes: Used gemini-flash. This is a distinct signature line clearly visible, which gpt-5-mini incorrectly merged into a broader 'signatures' row.
